boards.name: General Support
boards.description: A welcoming space for general mental health discussions, peer support, and everyday conversations about wellbeing.
guidelines: Be welcoming and supportive to everyone
Share your experiences and offer peer support
Respect all mental health journeys
Direct serious crises to the Crisis Support board

boards.name: Anxiety & Panic
boards.description: Support for anxiety disorders, panic attacks, social anxiety, and coping strategies
guidelines: Share your anxiety experiences without judgment
Offer practical coping techniques that have worked for you
Be supportive of others' anxiety struggles
Avoid giving medical advice - share experiences only

boards.name: Depression Support
boards.description: A space for depression support, understanding, and recovery discussions
guidelines: Share your depression journey openly and honestly
Support others without trying to 'fix' them
Share what helps you cope with low moods
Remember that recovery looks different for everyone

boards.name: Trauma & PTSD
boards.description: Support for trauma survivors, PTSD, and healing discussions
guidelines: Use content warnings for potentially triggering content
Share healing strategies that have helped you
Be extra gentle and supportive in responses
Respect others' boundaries and healing process

boards.name: Addiction & Recovery
boards.description: Support for addiction recovery, sobriety, and substance abuse issues
guidelines: Share your recovery journey and milestones
Support others in their recovery process
Avoid glorifying substance use
Celebrate sobriety milestones, big and small

boards.name: Relationships & Social
boards.description: Support for relationship issues, family problems, and social difficulties
guidelines: Share relationship challenges respectfully
Offer constructive advice and support
Respect all types of relationships and families
Focus on healthy communication strategies

boards.name: Success Stories
boards.description: Share victories, milestones, and positive progress in mental health
guidelines: Celebrate your mental health victories, big and small
Share what helped you achieve progress
Inspire others with your recovery story
Remember that progress isn't always linear

boards.name: Crisis Support
boards.description: Immediate peer support for mental health crises (not a substitute for professional help)
guidelines: This board is for immediate peer support only
Always encourage professional help for crises
Be extra supportive and non-judgmental
Include crisis resources in responses when appropriate

boards.name: Resources & Tools
boards.description: Share mental health resources, apps, books, and helpful tools
guidelines: Share helpful mental health resources you've found
Include brief reviews or descriptions
Focus on free/accessible resources when possible
No promotion of paid services or products

general: Be respectful and kind to all community members
No personal attacks, harassment, or discrimination
Keep discussions focused on mental health support
Respect anonymity - don't try to identify users
Use content warnings for potentially triggering content
No medical advice - share experiences only
This community supplements but doesn't replace professional help
posting: Stay anonymous - don't share identifying information
Keep posts relevant to the board topic
Avoid excessive venting without seeking support
crisis: Call 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) for immediate help
Text HOME to 741741 for crisis text support
Call 911 if you're in immediate physical danger
This forum provides peer support, not crisis intervention
Always encourage professional help for serious crises
